service.name: OpenAI API
service.description_for_ai: OpenAI flagship AI API. Access GPT models for text generation, code, vision, reasoning. DALL-E for image generation. Whisper for speech-to-text. TTS for text-to-speech. Embeddings for semantic search. The most widely used AI API with the largest ecosystem of integrations and SDKs.

auth.how_to_get: Register at https://platform.openai.com — $5 free credit on signup
auth.cost: GPT-4o-mini: $0.15/$0.60 per 1M tokens. GPT-5.2: $1.75/$14 per 1M tokens

capabilities.description_for_ai: Generate text responses using GPT models. The core capability — use for any text generation, answering questions, summarization, translation, code writing, analysis. Supports vision (images as input) with gpt-4o models.

model.description: Model ID. Recommended: gpt-4o-mini (cheap), gpt-4o (balanced), o3-mini (reasoning)

messages.description: Array of {role, content} objects. Roles: system, user, assistant

stream.description: Stream response tokens as they generate

capabilities.description_for_ai: Convert text to vector embeddings for semantic search, similarity comparison, and RAG. Use to find similar documents, cluster content, or build knowledge bases.

model.description: AI/ML model identifier to use for this request

input.description: Text or array of texts to embed

capabilities.description_for_ai: Transcribe audio to text using Whisper. Supports 50+ languages. Use for voice input, transcribing calls, processing audio files.

file.description: Audio file: mp3, mp4, wav, m4a, webm (max 25MB)

model.description: AI/ML model identifier to use for this request

language.description: ISO 639-1 language code. Auto-detected if omitted.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Generate images from text descriptions using DALL-E 3. Use for creating illustrations, product mockups, or visual content.

model.description: AI/ML model identifier to use for this request

agent_hints.model_choice: gpt-4o-mini for cheap tasks ($0.15/$0.60). gpt-4o for balanced quality/cost. o3-mini for complex reasoning. Use mini by default, upgrade only when quality is insufficient.
agent_hints.tool_use: Define tools as JSON Schema functions. Model decides when to call them. Essential for agentic workflows.
agent_hints.vision: Pass images as base64 or URL in message content: {type: image_url, image_url: {url: ...}}. Works with gpt-4o and gpt-4o-mini.
agent_hints.batch_api: Use Batch API for 50% discount on non-urgent tasks: submit job, get results within 24h.
agent_hints.token_counting: 1 token ≈ 4 chars in English, ≈ 2 chars in Russian/CJK. Input is cheaper than output.
